title: Career Resources - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada is committed to providing opportunities to help develop the next generation of researchers and scientists and to maintain the expertise required to meet the changing health needs of Canadians.

## Careers in the Scientific Community
To help us achieve our mandate to help Canadians maintain and improve their health, Health Canada employs a number of scientists and researchers in a wide variety of areas. These include the natural and life sciences as well as the social sciences .
For more information on the kinds of jobs available at Health Canada, and information on how to apply for these positions, please visit the Employment at Health Canada page.

## What Information is Available?
This section offers information on the federal government's Visiting Fellowships Program, which provides support for scientists to work with Canadian government laboratories and research institutions, including those at Health Canada.
This section also includes information on the federal science and technology community, Health Canada's Career Fairs and how to search for employment with Health Canada through the federal government's listings.
